2026-04-10T15:57:36.7075419Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-10T15:57:36.7076003Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-10T15:57:36.7076301Z 
2026-04-10T15:57:36.7076492Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-10T15:57:36.7076960Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-10T15:57:36.7077228Z 
2026-04-10T15:57:36.7077334Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-10T15:57:36.7077511Z 
2026-04-10T15:57:36.7077605Z Or undo this operation with:
2026-04-10T15:57:36.7077770Z 
2026-04-10T15:57:36.7077852Z   git switch -
2026-04-10T15:57:36.7077968Z

2026-04-10T15:57:52.3260138Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-10T15:57:52.3260706Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-10T15:57:52.3261143Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-10T15:57:52.3261525Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-10T15:57:52.3261842Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-10T15:57:52.3262079Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-10T15:57:52.3262240Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-10T15:57:52.3262418Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-10T15:57:52.3262587Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-10T15:57:52.3262818Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-10T15:57:52.3263310Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-10T15:57:52.3263570Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-10T16:05:41.1192786Z 
2026-04-10T16:05:42.6551774Z 1. 🔴 **README not updated** (medium) — The PR adds three new public route groups (`project.beta.agents`, `project.beta.skills`, `project.beta.toolboxes`) but `README.md` was not updated. The "Preview operation groups" sentence on line 130 lists all beta routes but omits the three new ones. The intro capability list and examples section are also missing coverage.
2026-04-10T16:05:42.6554373Z

2026-04-10T16:05:42.6779049Z

2026-04-10T16:05:48.0854572Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-10T16:05:48.0855014Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-04-10T16:05:48.0855655Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-04-10T16:05:48.0856192Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
